## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 111 published, 10 on CMS, 10 for review, 2 refresh articles coming](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [SOP articles performing well; safety content to be investigated](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Adjusting content strategy: comprehensive but focused articles, pillar page implementation](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Canonicalization plan in progress; traffic impact to be considered](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [111 articles published](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [10 articles on CMS by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [10 articles ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [2 refresh articles to be added from localization report](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [20 articles updated with new metadata (meta title and description only)](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [2 scheduled articles (SMS compliance pending legal review)](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Overall blog traffic showing positive trend](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [New content, especially SOPs, performing well](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Refresh content performance expected to improve with updates](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Top categories by CTR: SOPs, employee texting](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [Enterprise-related content recently published, awaiting performance data](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustment

  - [Current articles becoming longer and broader](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Agreement to adjust strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [Pillar pages for broader topics (e.g., translation)](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [Supporting blog posts to be comprehensive but focused on specific subtopics](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [First 2-3 H2s to provide basics, then dive deep into specific topic](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Team to implement this approach moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### Backlinks and Share of Voice

  - [Backlinks increased from 16k to 18k](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

  - [Discrepancy between Search Console and other tools explained](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)

  - [Decision to continue producing some employee survey content for overall authority](https://fathom.video/share/w81m1XwRjBAnYxJzfy8psLYJnY6zyrQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
